backstory.original: BBEG is the Big Bad Evil Guy brought to life by Pat, the DM of the Awful Ones. This drow necromancer believes immaculate planning will always lead to success, but his constant failures contradict this conviction. BBEG likes to monologue and taunt his opponents, leaving his summoned zombies to engage directly in combat.
backstory.display: BBEG 是恶人地下城主帕特唤醒的超级大坏蛋（Big Bad Evil Guy）。这位卓尔精灵巫法师相信完美的计划总能直达成功，但他接二连三的失败却与这一信念互相矛盾。BBEG 喜欢长篇大论并嘲讽对手，然后指使他召唤的僵尸直接参与战斗。

description.original: BBEG conjures a spectral hand over the enemy with the most health and touches it, dealing one hit.
description.display: BBEG 在生命值最高的敌人上方召唤出一只幽灵手并触碰对方，造成一次伤害。

name.display: 巴尔格罗努斯的亡灵大军

description.original: Balgronuuth's symbol appears in the air for 30 seconds, causing Rise, My Minions! to summon two zombies instead of one.
description.display: 巴尔格罗努斯的圣徽在空中出现 30 秒，使“苏醒吧，我的仆从！”召唤出两个僵尸而非一个。

longDescription.original: Balgronuuth's symbol appears in the air for 30 seconds. While the symbol is in the air, every time Rise, My Minions! summons a zombie, it summons two instead of one.
longDescription.display: 巴尔格罗努斯的圣徽在空中出现 30 秒。圣徽出现在空中时，“苏醒吧，我的仆从！”每次都会召唤两个僵尸，而非一个。

description.original: BBEG increases the damage of all Champions with an INT score of 12 or below, this score can be moved with feats.
description.display: BBEG 使所有智力小于等于 12 的勇士伤害提高，此数值可通过专长改变。

name.display: 巴尔格罗努斯的亡灵大军

description.desc: As the sworn enemy of the Awful Ones, $source is eligible for any adventure that any of them are eligible for. However, they still don't remember who he is.
作恶人的宿敌，$source有资格参加该组织任何成员可参加的任何冒险。但他们依然不记得他是谁。
BBEG counts as "undead" for the purposes of effects that care about dead Champions (Desmond, Kas), but "alive" for all other purposes.
对于影响已死亡勇士（戴斯蒙德、凯斯）的效果，BBEG 算作“亡灵”，对于所有其他效果则算作“存活”。
$source increases the damage of all Champions with an Intelligence of 12 or less by $(amount)%.
$source使所有智力小于等于 12 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: BBEG increases the damage of all Champions with an INT score of 12 or less.
tipText.display: BBEG 使所有智力小于等于 12 的勇士伤害提高。

description.desc: $source increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each active potion, stacking multiplicatively.
每种已激活药剂均使$source的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
$source increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位邪恶勇士均使$source的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠并以乘算方式应用。

specializationDescription.original: BBEG powers his evil empire with Evil minions
specializationDescription.display: BBEG 通过邪恶仆从来强化他的邪恶帝国

description.desc: $source increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion with a total ability score of 78 or less in the formation, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
阵型中每位总属性值低于等于 78 的勇士，均使$source的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠并以乘算方式应用。

specializationDescription.original: BBEG powers his evil empire with bumbling minions
specializationDescription.display: BBEG 使用笨拙仆从来强化他的邪恶帝国

description.desc: $source increases the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Lawful Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位守序勇士均使$source的$(upgrade_name id)伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠并以乘算方式应用。

specializationDescription.original: BBEG powers his evil empire with Lawful minions
specializationDescription.display: BBEG 使用守序仆从来强化他的邪恶帝国

description.desc: Every $(spawn_rate) seconds $source creates a plodding zombie that appears in front of the party and slowly plods forward. Zombies persist with area changes. Enemies near the zombie take $(amount) seconds worth of BUD damage per second.
每隔 $(spawn_rate) 秒，$source在探险队前方创造出一具蹒跚的僵尸并缓慢前行。僵尸可在区域改变后持续存在。僵尸附近的敌人每秒受到 $(amount) 秒的基础杀招伤害。

name.display: 巴尔格罗努斯的亡灵大军

description.desc: The time it takes for Rise, My Minions! to summon a zombie is reduced by $(amount___3) seconds for each Awful Ones affiliation member in the formation, and the damage bonus of $(upgrade_name id___2) is increased by $(amount)% for each summoned zombie, stacking multiplicatively, with buffs applying to the pre-stack value.
阵型中的每位恶人从属组织成员均使“苏醒吧，我的仆从！”所需的时间缩短 $(amount___3) 秒，每一具召唤出的僵尸均使 $(upgrade_name id___2) 伤害加成提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，并且增益作用于堆叠前的数值。
If the current area is completed in $(seconds_plural amount) or less, $source reduces the next area's quest requirements by $(amount___2)%.
如果在 $(seconds_plural amount) 或更短时间内完成当前区域，$source使下一个区域的任务要求降低 $(amount___2)%。

tipText.original: BBEG reduces the next area quest requirements if you are completing areas quickly.
tipText.display: 快速完成区域后，BBEG 可以加你下一个区域的任务要求。

description.original: Oh, I misspoke -- retconning that to 'selfishness'.
description.display: 哦，我说错了--改成“自私”吧。

description.original: 'Minions! Gather your bones!' Hey, stop laughing -- it's not that funny!
description.display: 小的们！收拾好你们的骨头！”嘿，别笑了，一点也不好笑！

description.original: 'Yes! Use Balgronuuth's power! You all would make incredible henchmen!'
description.display: “没错！借助巴尔格罗努斯的力量！你们都会成为非同凡响的喽啰！”

description.original: Well, I guess we're doing an evil campaign now. See you all next week...
description.display: 呃，看来我们正在进行一场邪恶的活动。各位下周见......

description.original: I'll be honest, I didn't think you'd wipe out that whole village!
description.display: 老实说，我没想到你会摧毁整个村庄！

effects.description: Changes $(upgrade_name id) to target champions with Int 11 or lower instead

description.original: I had to write this one up myself -- the book didn't have anything evil enough.
description.display: 契约只能由我自己来写--书里没有足够邪恶的内容。

description.original: Are you really trying to bribe me for more evil power? Oh, is that pizza?
description.display: 你真的想通过贿赂我来获得更多邪恶力量吗？哇，那是披萨吗？

description.original: 'I can re-summon them -- better, stronger!'
description.display: “我可以重新召唤它们--更优质、更强大！”

description.original: He's done this spell so many times he could do it with his eyes closed.
description.display: 他已经用过这个法术很多次了，闭着眼睛也能施放。

description.original: We don't have time now because someone needed a shopping session!
description.display: 我们没时间了，因为有人需要购物！

description.original: 'With this, I am even more powerful than before! Muahahah!'
description.display: “这样一来，我比以前更强大了！哈哈哈！”

description.original: 'Balgronuuth is really a nice god when you get to know them.'
description.display: “深入了解之后，你就会发现巴尔格罗努斯真是个不错的神。”

description.original: 'Now you face me at my true potential! Victory WILL be mine!'
description.display: “现在你将面对我的真正实力！胜利将属于我！”

description.original: Okay, you hide behind the door. Wait for all of them to come in and then attack!
description.display: 好，你躲到门后面去。等他们全部进来之后再进攻！

description.original: I've hoarded an assortment of accursed concoctions just for this occasion.
description.display: 我囤积了各种各样受诅咒的调制品，就是为了这一刻。

description.original: Death is not the end. Life begins after death. Live your afterlife to the fullest.
description.display: 死亡并非终点。生命在死后才开始。尽情享受你的来世吧。

description.original: This was the dagger he used to start his journey of evil.
description.display: 这就是他用来开启邪恶之旅的那把匕首。

description.original: The blood that stains this dagger imbues it with evil magic.
description.display: 这把匕首上的血迹使它充满邪恶的魔力。

description.original: 'This blade has killed many innocents,' he says with an evil laugh.
description.display: “这把刀杀死过许多无辜的人，”他邪笑着说。

description.original: You see a sword glowing with evil runes and a skull crossguard. It's badass.
description.display: 这是一把闪耀着邪恶符文和骷髅护手的剑。实在太酷了。

description.original: Yeah, I guess I could give this DM thing a try.
description.display: 唔，我也许可以试试所谓的地下城主。

description.original: This is full of sticky notes now.
description.display: 上面现在满是便签。

description.original: I actually made this all by myself. Yes, that is tape painted to look like wood.
description.display: 全都是我自己做的。没错，那是涂成木头样子的胶带。

description.original: It has tiny catapults to throw things at players when they sneak a peek.
description.display: 附带微型投石器，当玩家偷看时可以向他们扔东西。

description.original: He didn't always have an undead army. He started with just a talking skull.
description.display: 他并非生来就拥有亡灵大军。他刚开始只有一颗会说话的骷髅头。

description.original: One day the skull began talking about Balgronuuth, and he listened intently.
description.display: 某天，骷髅头开始谈论巴尔格罗努斯，而他聚精会神地听着。

description.original: 'My master will usher in the reign of Balgronuuth!' The herald begins to glow.
description.display: “我的主人将迎来巴尔格罗努斯的统治！”使者开始洋洋自得。

description.original: 'You should serve my master,' says the general. 'Great dental plan for biting.'
description.display: “你应该为我的主人服务，”将军说，“提供可观的咬人牙科福利。”

description.original: I just had this laying around. It'll do the job.
description.display: 我只要带着就行，它会完成任务的。

description.original: Don't touch! This has all my brilliant ideas in it - they're secret!
description.display: 不许碰！里面记录着我所有的绝妙想法--都是秘密！

description.original: Look, I didn't know how to bind a book and this one was the coolest online.
description.display: 听着，我不会装订书本，而这本书是网上最酷的。

description.original: 'With this tome I will finally release Balgronuuth and destroy this realm!'
description.display: “有了这本宝书，我就能释放巴尔格罗努斯，摧毁这个王国！”

description.original: Oh, it comes with dice. These will do until I get some nice ones.
description.display: 哦，它附带骰子。得到更高级的骰子之前先用着吧。

effects.description: Increases the effect of BBEG's Specialization choices by $(amount)%.

description.original: DO NOT TOUCH THIS D20! YOU'LL JUST CURSE IT!
description.display: 不要碰这个 20 面骰子！你会诅咒它的！

effects.description: Increases the effect of BBEG's Specialization choices by $(amount)%.

description.original: Wow, these edges are pretty sharp...
description.display: 哇，边缘可真锋利......

effects.description: Increases the effect of BBEG's Specialization choices by $(amount)%.

description.original: Oh, here Eva, you can use my D20 for the save.
description.display: 给你，伊娃，你可以用我的 20 面骰子来豁免。

effects.description: Increases the effect of BBEG's Specialization choices by $(amount)%.

description.original: This was his brother's. The players don't need to know he killed his brother.
description.display: 这是他兄弟的。玩家们不需要知道他杀了他的兄弟。

name.display: 不显眼的 NPC 盔甲

description.original: No, no, he's just a normal NPC that needs to be escorted somewhere.
description.display: 不不不，他只是个普通的 NPC，需要被护送到某个地方去。

description.original: I totally never, ever, expected this NPC to be part of the story - nope.
description.display: 我从来没有想过这个 NPC 会成为故事的一部分--没有。

description.original: HOW MUCH DAMAGE?! I mean, haha! He has immunity to that type of damage!
description.display: 多少伤害？！我的意思是，哈哈！他免疫那种类型的伤害！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Lawful Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: BBEG is the Big Bad Evil Guy brought to life by Pat, the DM of the Awful Ones. This drow necromancer believes immaculate planning will always lead to success, but his constant failures contradict this conviction. BBEG likes to monologue and taunt his opponents, leaving his summoned zombies to engage directly in combat.
character_sheet_details.system_description: BBEG is a Support Speed Champion who can railroad the party back to the action

event_upgrades.name: Evil Overlord
event_upgrades.description: BBEG increases the damage of all Champions with an INT score of 12 or below, this score can be moved with feats.

character_sheet_details.backstory: BBEG 是恶人地下城主帕特唤醒的超级大坏蛋（Big Bad Evil Guy）。这位卓尔精灵巫法师相信完美的计划总能直达成功，但他接二连三的失败却与这一信念互相矛盾。BBEG 喜欢长篇大论并嘲讽对手，然后指使他召唤的僵尸直接参与战斗。
character_sheet_details.system_description: BBEG 是一名支援速度型勇士，擅长带领探险队重返战场

event_upgrades.name: 邪恶霸主
event_upgrades.description: BBEG 使所有智力小于等于 12 的勇士伤害提高，此数值可通过专长改变。

event_upgrades.name: 巴尔格罗努斯的亡灵大军

display.description: 我们没时间了，因为有人需要购物！

display.name: 遭遇战大师
display.description: 好，你躲到门后面去。等他们全部进来之后再进攻！

display.name: 秘密储藏

display.name: 亡灵军团
display.description: 死亡并非终点。生命在死后才开始。尽情享受你的来世吧。

original.name: Ritual Athame

display.name: 仪式匕首
display.description: 这就是他用来开启邪恶之旅的那把匕首。

original.name: Stained Dagger
original.description: The blood that stains this dagger imbues it with evil magic.

display.name: 斑驳匕首
display.description: 这把匕首上的血迹使它充满邪恶的魔力。

original.name: Necrotic Cleaver
original.description: 'This blade has killed many innocents,' he says with an evil laugh.

display.name: 暗蚀砍刀
display.description: “这把刀杀死过许多无辜的人，”他邪笑着说。

original.name: Deathfrost

display.name: 死霜
display.description: 这是一把闪耀着邪恶符文和骷髅护手的剑。实在太酷了。

original.name: Borrowed Screen

display.name: 借来的屏风
display.description: 唔，我也许可以试试所谓的地下城主。

original.name: Updated Screen
original.description: This is full of sticky notes now.

display.name: 更新的屏风
display.description: 上面现在满是便签。

original.name: Hand Made Kit
original.description: I actually made this all by myself. Yes, that is tape painted to look like wood.

display.name: 自制套件
display.description: 全都是我自己做的。没错，那是涂成木头样子的胶带。

original.name: Barrier of Meta Protection
original.description: It has tiny catapults to throw things at players when they sneak a peek.

display.name: 超凡防护屏障
display.description: 附带微型投石器，当玩家偷看时可以向他们扔东西。

original.name: Annoying Skull
original.description: He didn't always have an undead army. He started with just a talking skull.

display.name: 聒噪骷髅
display.description: 他并非生来就拥有亡灵大军。他刚开始只有一颗会说话的骷髅头。

original.name: Undead Advisor
original.description: One day the skull began talking about Balgronuuth, and he listened intently.

display.name: 亡灵顾问
display.description: 某天，骷髅头开始谈论巴尔格罗努斯，而他聚精会神地听着。

original.name: Skeletal Herald
original.description: 'My master will usher in the reign of Balgronuuth!' The herald begins to glow.

display.name: 骷髅使者
display.description: “我的主人将迎来巴尔格罗努斯的统治！”使者开始洋洋自得。

original.name: Zarxox, Undead General
original.description: 'You should serve my master,' says the general. 'Great dental plan for biting.'

display.name: 亡灵将军扎索克斯
display.description: “你应该为我的主人服务，”将军说，“提供可观的咬人牙科福利。”

original.name: Old Notebook
original.description: I just had this laying around. It'll do the job.

display.name: 旧笔记本
display.description: 我只要带着就行，它会完成任务的。

original.name: Story Journal
original.description: Don't touch! This has all my brilliant ideas in it - they're secret!

display.name: 故事日志
display.description: 不许碰！里面记录着我所有的绝妙想法--都是秘密！

original.name: Book from E'tsyy
original.description: Look, I didn't know how to bind a book and this one was the coolest online.

display.name: 伊趣的书
display.description: 听着，我不会装订书本，而这本书是网上最酷的。

original.name: Omniscient Tome
original.description: 'With this tome I will finally release Balgronuuth and destroy this realm!'

display.name: 全能宝书
display.description: “有了这本宝书，我就能释放巴尔格罗努斯，摧毁这个王国！”

original.name: Starter Kit Die
original.description: Oh, it comes with dice. These will do until I get some nice ones.

effects.description: Increases the effect of BBEG's Specialization choices by $(amount)%.

display.name: 新手套件骰子
display.description: 哦，它附带骰子。得到更高级的骰子之前先用着吧。

effects.description: 使 BBEG 的专精选择的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: DM's Die
original.description: DO NOT TOUCH THIS D20! YOU'LL JUST CURSE IT!

effects.description: Increases the effect of BBEG's Specialization choices by $(amount)%.

display.name: 地下城主的骰子
display.description: 不要碰这个 20 面骰子！你会诅咒它的！

effects.description: 使 BBEG 的专精选择的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Metal D20
original.description: Wow, these edges are pretty sharp...

effects.description: Increases the effect of BBEG's Specialization choices by $(amount)%.

display.name: 金属 20 面骰子
display.description: 哇，边缘可真锋利......

effects.description: 使 BBEG 的专精选择的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Die of 1 for All
original.description: Oh, here Eva, you can use my D20 for the save.

effects.description: Increases the effect of BBEG's Specialization choices by $(amount)%.

display.name: 我为人人骰子
display.description: 给你，伊娃，你可以用我的 20 面骰子来豁免。

effects.description: 使 BBEG 的专精选择的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Backstory Plate
original.description: This was his brother's. The players don't need to know he killed his brother.

display.name: 幕后故事板甲
display.description: 这是他兄弟的。玩家们不需要知道他杀了他的兄弟。

original.name: Inconspicuous NPC Armor
original.description: No, no, he's just a normal NPC that needs to be escorted somewhere.

display.name: 不显眼的 NPC 盔甲
display.description: 不不不，他只是个普通的 NPC，需要被护送到某个地方去。

original.name: Not-the-Villain Plate
original.description: I totally never, ever, expected this NPC to be part of the story - nope.

display.name: 不是恶棍板甲
display.description: 我从来没有想过这个 NPC 会成为故事的一部分--没有。

original.name: Armor of the Plot
original.description: HOW MUCH DAMAGE?! I mean, haha! He has immunity to that type of damage!

display.name: 剧情盔甲
display.description: 多少伤害？！我的意思是，哈哈！他免疫那种类型的伤害！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Elf Champions by $(amount)%
使所有精灵勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有感知大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 15 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位感知大于等于 15 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Lawful Champions by $(amount)%
使所有守序阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
